# Feather Icons

- **Source**: https://github.com/feathericons/feather
- **Site**: https://feathericons.com
- **Author**: Cole Bemis
- **License**: MIT (see `LICENSE`)
- **Version fetched**: depth-1 clone, 2026-04-21
- **Icon count**: 287 SVGs
- **Style**: thin, consistent 24x24 stroke, 2px weight
- **Raw SVG path**: `icons/`
- **Grid**: 24x24

## Contents

- `icons/` — 287 single-style SVGs (one file per icon, kebab-case names)
- `LICENSE` — MIT
- `README.md` — upstream readme (unmodified)

## Consolidate notes

- Good baseline UI set (arrows, media, file, system). Same stroke grammar as Lucide but smaller and older.
- Smaller than the requested 500 floor but kept — Feather is the reference stroke set referenced by downstream forks (Lucide, etc.).
- No variant weights. If you need filled/outline pairs, pair with Eva or Majesticons.
